mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_ID, TITLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM NOTICE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY NOTICE_ID DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N'
SELECT NOTICE_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, USER_NO FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NOTICE_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, USER_NO, DELETE_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTICE.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{userNo}, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
UPDATE NOTICE SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
